---
title: "SmartPolicy Recommender System"
subtitle: "AI Governance Implication"
venue: ERGO, Düsseldorf, Germany
description: >-
  Case study analysing the AI governance implications of **SmartPolicy**, a new recommender system for tailored insurance policy recommendations.
date: 2026-03-27
draft: true
---

On Friday, March 27, 2026, I gave a presentation outlining the AI governance implications of a hypothetical new recommender system used by an insurance company. You can find the slides below or click [here](presentation.html){target="_blank"} to open them in full screen. 

```{=html}
<iframe width="800" height="500" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" src="presentation.html"></iframe>
```
